caption_text: The verb algebra · operations touch the seed, destinations receive the render

cards.dims_superseded: primer_diagram_language: the verb-algebra cross re-derives to ink-solved satellite boxes (the spec 144x60, the narrowest card) with a 232x112 nucleus, superseding this earlier topology specimen's uniform-floor cards; the hand file still validates its own dims.

hub_seats_superseded.documents: snug-width ruling 2026-07-14: the E satellites solve to their own ink, moving the name-run seat ~6% inside the hand file's wide-card throw
hub_seats_superseded.read, never mutates: primer_diagram_language's ink-solved satellite family (cards.dims_superseded) is narrower than this specimen's own now-superseded wide-floor cards; a spine-centered sole S satellite's incidental icon+text lean shallows to ~109.1deg/262.0 (Δangle 6.6deg, Δthrow 9.2%, both outside the +/-4deg/+/-6% band) instead of this specimen's measured 115.7deg/288.5. A card-position nudge used to close the gap but un-verticalized the connector (M 620,470 L 620,634 in the specimen — zero x-delta) along with it; the connector is the higher-fidelity ground truth, so the seat target is amended here instead.
hub_seats_superseded.surfaces: snug-width ruling 2026-07-14: the E satellites solve to their own ink, moving the name-run seat ~6% inside the hand file's wide-card throw
hub_seats_superseded.transform: primer_diagram_language's ink-solved satellite family (cards.dims_superseded) is narrower than this specimen's own now-superseded wide-floor cards; a spine-centered sole N satellite's incidental icon+text lean shallows to ~-97.1deg/262.4 (Δangle 6.6deg, within throw tolerance but outside the +/-4deg angle band) instead of this specimen's measured -103.7deg/273.8. A card-position nudge used to close the gap but un-verticalized the connector (M 620,350 L 620,184 in the specimen — zero x-delta) along with it; the connector is the higher-fidelity ground truth, so the seat target is amended here instead.
